ru.title: AliStore
ru.subtitle: Электроника и POS
ru.releaseNotes: Первый нативный релиз AliStore: клиентский каталог, корзина, checkout, staff login, очередь заказов и POS-продажа поверх единого API.
ru.promoText: Нативное приложение AliStore для покупок, заказов и POS-работы магазина.

en-US.title: AliStore
en-US.subtitle: Electronics and POS
en-US.releaseNotes: First native AliStore release with customer catalog, cart, checkout, staff login, order queue, and POS sale flow over the shared API.
en-US.promoText: Native AliStore app for electronics shopping, orders, and POS operations.

review.notes: Demo credentials must be provisioned in the production API before App Review. The app needs network access to the AliStore API. Staff/POS features are role-gated; customer catalog and checkout can be reviewed without staff permissions.
